zh.Manzanedo, Villaviciosa, Asturias, Españ: 西班牙阿斯圖里亞斯維利亞維其薩曼展內多
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gómez González de Manzanedo於從1120年到1130年出生在西班牙阿斯圖里亞斯維利亞維其薩曼展內多時，他的父親Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo50歲，母親María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir35歲。他和Mayor Manríquez de Lara至少有1個女兒。他去世於1182年10月12日。

zh-hans.Manzanedo, Villaviciosa, Asturias, Españ: 西班牙阿斯圖里亞斯維利亞維其薩曼展內多
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gómez González de Manzanedo于从1120年到1130年出生在西班牙阿斯圖里亞斯維利亞維其薩曼展內多时，他的父亲Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo50岁，母亲María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir35岁。他和Mayor Manríquez de Lara至少有1个女儿。他去世于1182年10月12日。

nameMeanings.name: González
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Jorge, Pedro, Francisco, Miguel, Ramon, Raul, Mario.
Spanish (González): patronymic from the personal name Gonzalo . Compare De Gonzalez , Gonsales , Gunsalus , and Portuguese Goncalves .

variants.name: Gonzelez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsalez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Ruben, Ignacio, Manuel, Alfredo, Elena, Felipe, Guadalupe, Gustavo, Jesus, Jorge.
Hispanic (Gonsález): altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gongalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzolas
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Ruben, Arcadio, Artemio, Erasmo, Ernesto, Eusebio, Juan, Lupe, Manuel, Miguel.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzalo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Miguel, Pedro, Albino, Amador, Angelina, Arana, Arnaldo, Blanco, Carlos, Casimiro, Castro, Diego.
Spanish: from the personal name Gonzalo, of Visigothic origin, formed with the element gunth ‘battle’.

variants.name: De Gonzalez
meanings: Spanish (De González): patronymic from González (see Gonzalez ), with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Gozalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Ruben, Pedro, Raul, Guadalupe, Lupe.
Spanish: altered form of González (see Gonzalez ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Manzanedo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: topographic name from manzanero, dialect form of manzanal ‘apple grove’ (derivative of manzana ‘apple’), denoting someone who lived in a place where apple trees are.

nameMeanings.name: Gómez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘complete’ in Hebrew), borne by a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah. It is in occasional use in the United States. Gomer is also an English surname, derived from an Old English personal name composed of gōd ‘good’ + mǣr ‘famous’, and the given name may also be a transferred use of this.

en.lifeSummary: When Gómez González de Manzanedo was born from 1120 to 1130, in Manzanedo, Villaviciosa, Asturias, Spain, his father, Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo, was 50 and his mother, María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir, was 35. He had at least 1 daughter with Mayor Manríquez de Lara. He died on 12 October 1182.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gómez González de Manzanedo est né du 1120 au 1130, à Manzanedo, Villaviciosa, Asturias, Espagne, son père, Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo, avait 50 ans et sa mère, María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mayor Manríquez de Lara. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1182.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gómez González de Manzanedo von 1120 bis 1130 in Manzanedo, Villaviciosa, Asturias, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo 50 und seine Mutter María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir 35. Er hatte mit Mayor Manríquez de Lara mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1182.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gómez González de Manzanedo è nato il da 1120 a 1130 nel Manzanedo, Villaviciosa, Asturias, Spagna, il suo padre, Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mayor Manríquez de Lara. Morì il 12 ottobre 1182.

ja.Manzanedo, Villaviciosa, Asturias, Españ: スペインアストゥリアスヴィラヴィシオサマンザンエド
ja.lifeSummary: Gómez González de Manzanedoがから1120年まで1130年にスペインアストゥリアスヴィラヴィシオサマンザンエドで生まれた時，父Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedoは50歳，母María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexirは35歳であった。彼はMayor Manríquez de Laraとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1182年10月12日に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gómez González de Manzanedo(이)가 1120년 부터 1130년 까지 스페인 애스투리아스 비래빅이오사 먼자네도에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Mayor Manríquez de Lara(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1182년 10월 12일 사망했다.

lv.from 1120 to 1130–12 October 1182: no 1120. gada līdz 1130. gadam–1182. gada 12. oktobris

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gómez González de Manzanedo nasceu de 1120 a 1130, em Manzanedo, Villaviciosa, Asturias, Espanha, seu pai, Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mayor Manríquez de Lara. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1182.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gómez González de Manzanedo родился с 1120 по 1130 в местности манзанедо, виллависиоса, астуряс, Испания, его отцу по имени Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir, 35. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mayor Manríquez de Lara. Он умер 12 октября 1182 г.

sm.from 1120 to 1130: mai le 1120 e o'o I le 1130

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gómez González de Manzanedo nació desde 1120 hasta 1130, en Manzanedo, Villaviciosa, Asturias, España, su papá, Gonzalo Gómez de Manzanedo, tenía 50 años y su mamá, María Díaz de Haro González de Manzaneda y de Alexir, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Mayor Manríquez de Lara. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1182.
